_about.buckets: Per 15-minute simulation-time window: how long (median_s) the controller stayed in that SUMO phase while the vehicle-demand window (day CSV) covered sim_time. n = number of segment samples.
_about.phase_legend: Each phase index is the order of <phase> elements in SUMO tlLogic program 0. sumo_state: one character per traffic-light link in SUMO internal link order (G=major green, g=minor green, y=yellow, r=red).

J_centre.name: NS_thru
J_centre.title: NS thru
J_centre.meaning: main green band for through (and usually right-turn) lanes on North-South approaches (as wired in your SUMO network); other legs follow red/yellow per the state string. Signal links in SUMO order: 4 link(s) major green (G), 2 link(s) minor green (g), 10 red (r).

J_centre.name: NS_amber1
J_centre.title: NS amber1
J_centre.meaning: Yellow / clearance between greens: vehicles facing yellow should stop; typically short. Signal links in SUMO order: 8 yellow (y), 8 red (r).

J_centre.name: NS_left
J_centre.title: NS left
J_centre.meaning: protected left-turn green on North-South approaches (as wired in your SUMO network); other legs follow red/yellow per the state string. Signal links in SUMO order: 2 link(s) minor green (g), 14 red (r).

J_centre.name: NS_amber2
J_centre.title: NS amber2
J_centre.meaning: Yellow / clearance between greens: vehicles facing yellow should stop; typically short. Signal links in SUMO order: 2 yellow (y), 14 red (r).

J_centre.name: EW_thru
J_centre.title: EW thru
J_centre.meaning: main green band for through (and usually right-turn) lanes on East-West approaches (as wired in your SUMO network); other legs follow red/yellow per the state string. Signal links in SUMO order: 4 link(s) major green (G), 2 link(s) minor green (g), 10 red (r).

J_centre.name: EW_amber1
J_centre.title: EW amber1
J_centre.meaning: Yellow / clearance between greens: vehicles facing yellow should stop; typically short. Signal links in SUMO order: 8 yellow (y), 8 red (r).

J_centre.name: EW_left
J_centre.title: EW left
J_centre.meaning: protected left-turn green on East-West approaches (as wired in your SUMO network); other legs follow red/yellow per the state string. Signal links in SUMO order: 2 link(s) minor green (g), 14 red (r).

J_centre.name: EW_amber2
J_centre.title: EW amber2
J_centre.meaning: Yellow / clearance between greens: vehicles facing yellow should stop; typically short. Signal links in SUMO order: 2 yellow (y), 14 red (r).
